# misp_warninglist (Resource)

Enable or disable a MISP warninglist. The warninglist definition must already exist on the instance (warninglists are bundled with MISP). Destroying the resource disables the warninglist — it does not remove the definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "misp_warninglist" "akamai" {
  name    = "List of known Akamai IP ranges"
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the warninglist is active on this instance.
- `name` (String) Full warninglist name (e.g. `List of known Akamai IP ranges`). Replaces the resource if changed.

### Read-Only

- `category` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) Numeric MISP identifier.
- `type` (String)
- `valid_attributes` (String)
- `version` (String)
- `warninglist_entry_count` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
#!/bin/sh
# Import a MISP warninglist by numeric id. After import, set `name` in your
# config to match what MISP reports for that id.
terraform import misp_warninglist.akamai 1
```
